item.g:title: Premium Leather Wallet
item.g:description: Handcrafted full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology. Features 6 card slots, 2 bill compartments, and ID window. Slim profile fits comfortably in front pocket. Genuine Italian leather ages beautifully with use.

item.g:title: Merino Wool Scarf
item.g:description: Luxuriously soft merino wool scarf sourced from ethically raised sheep in New Zealand. 180cm length and 30cm width provides versatile styling options. Naturally temperature-regulating and moisture-wicking for year-round comfort. Hand-wash only.

item.g:title: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
item.g:description: Set of 3 premium bamboo cutting boards in small, medium, and large sizes. Naturally antimicrobial surface resists bacteria and odors. Juice grooves prevent mess. Harder than maple wood yet gentle on knife edges. Dishwasher safe and sustainably sourced.

item.g:title: Titanium Sunglasses
item.g:description: Ultra-lightweight titanium frame sunglasses with polarized UV400 lenses. Weighing only 18 grams, they are ideal for outdoor activities. Scratch-resistant lenses reduce glare from water and roads. Includes hard case and cleaning cloth. Available prescription-ready.

item.g:title: Cedar Wood Soap Dish
item.g:description: Handcarved aromatic cedar wood soap dish with slatted design that allows water to drain and soap to dry between uses. Cedar naturally repels mold and mildew. Subtle natural fragrance. Fits standard bar soaps. Sustainably harvested from certified forests in Scandinavia.
